textByHashes.8d982a597ca224b233df00ed837081157b56c8e5: Good, you're here. Shall we get started?
textByHashes.8f1342d1a1dedae7291905f6a2d77ebcd8d4ff7a: I've been observing the property and it doesn't seem anyone is home. At least, not any people...
textByHashes.9bd7ca29802e636186393e5168aa3c99b5c11e1f: Dogs. There's one outside and at least one more in the house. I don't expect them to take kindly to intruders.
textByHashes.80d1a4064a301036b1d390358ecafd372a40f6e3: We will secure the house and prepare a trap to capture this cultist leader upon their return. As we don't know exactly when that will be, I suggest we move quickly.
textByHashes.ae1d84d4b24969d28f59b0d815d63a38b489a891: First up, we need a way inside. I will keep watch out here while you find us that way in.
textByHashes.e6348506d92702121c55fcbc0cd5f0678380407e: We're wasting time here. You need to find a way into this house.
textByHashes.ee66b015da94e78684e7554adf3865e41c30a756: That cultist could be back at any time. What's the hold up?
textByHashes.b10c923472c8dfe1428ac9ce2769e6d91d9e4445: Good. Best you get back to it then.
textByHashes.c7b8d7535d507fd06a865a73aef684ecd0a09516: Good work. Now that the property is secure, we need to prepare for the return of this Forebearer Janus. I trust you brought supplies?
textByHashes.87a1c709c63a6c02f4bed1b782ef252b0e3b2a3d: First, we'll need a way to restrain him.
textByHashes.b22353f2dcb459ce7fc43856a183a2458e96b93c: Well, what about something to knock him out with?
textByHashes.748a1a69735f474e185a833d106851e50ea216e1: No. This cultist could be back at any moment and we need to make sure we're here when he does. Let's have a look around and see if there's anything in the house we can use instead.
textByHashes.d12f3ba51e998b6c9de92c6d6ac1b13453f6eff0: He is the leader of the Knights of Varlamore, though I am currently filling that role in his absense.
textByHashes.f0621c53c4869ed614c57f559068d065cb694417: I think we have a job to do, and I think we should get on with it rather than making small talk.
textByHashes.15d880f39414d3beb28ca40fc5a884229656ab7e: Hmm... I guess we could use this to restrain him, but I reckon we'll instead want something that can cover his head as well.
textByHashes.08fd01d79ce8a9f6dd9425c376df0d7359e439c2: No. I think that sack you gave me will be better for restraining him with.
textByHashes.f40c2cea9faddd9242efc27dddc64060cf3f23af: That thing looks brutal! We don't want to kill him!
textByHashes.5cd6cbc2b631449d8295d8d0afe27395e798e70f: That thing looks brutal! We don't want to kill him! Maybe you should use that other one you made instead.
textByHashes.32f59b9224ad577e97e74952a681b9c58d66fdd5: Yes, I think I can use this to restrain him with. I'll keep a hold of it.
textByHashes.5b77132c8caeb854172d4d5369d57979076c5e3e: Hmm... Not on its own, I don't think.
textByHashes.515c4121835b5953c6608724ce397ef9cbc24a1d: Perfect! You keep a hold of that and use it to subdue him when the time comes.
textByHashes.aa50ea64ad133eefae163bc4008ecc47e6f30f31: I believe you're right. Now just to wait for him to return home...
textByHashes.098688b4ba10145b8401aae275ef4a1c3ebb0430: Good. Down there will work nicely for interrogation. You get him ready. I'll fetch the Queen...
textByHashes.ee5e07e2b760c9b9aa8643468c2571eb92714c32: I hear you're heading to Cam Torum. You should not waste time.
textByHashes.d9e055562a64d20654fedf39dfc4aa45390d0fde: No. I am to head to the Tlati Rainforest and ensure we have suitable defences around the Crypt of Tonali.
textByHashes.055bc2b5237db6d9e9c3ae3f8e6a8614f27e4242: Adventurer, about time you showed up! Hold them back! If we let too many defenders fall, nothing will stop those cultists getting through!
textByHashes.23fca5ac15acc7e27fb5432d6b4a73666e3a0b3d: Forgive me, my Queen. She was injured, but she managed to escape down into the caverns.
textByHashes.3fc8880cddf2c6668451a2286652e6bc0f251c56: Move along then. I have a lot of work to be doing.
textByHashes.b87d0763e775970f2af45759e495f54c84b6224e: Good day to you, adventurer. Do you need something?
textByHashes.97c1475254ddcf9648b4c6fa338b7f0334647c65: Things are very well thank you. Prince Itzla has tasked me with keeping an eye on the remaining Emissaries.
textByHashes.ce4edd6396c7347e5df8cb03c0c3d6bd06fdfdbd: Swift justice must be dealt if they try anything, but until then, the Prince would prefer we not stir the pot. They no longer pose a real threat now their leaders have gone.
textByHashes.2cc357e375be7ed363c8a381b6b4eff3b6afb1a5: Indeed. May the sun light your way, adventurer.
